mapper.select:
select * from base_supplier
and supplier_code like concat('%', #{supplierCode}, '%')
and supplier_name like concat('%', #{supplierName}, '%')
and status = #{status}
order by id desc
mapper.insert: insert into base_supplier(supplier_code, supplier_name, contact_person, contact_phone, address, currency, tax_rate, status, remark, create_by, create_time) values (#{supplierCode}, #{supplierName}, #{contactPerson}, #{contactPhone}, #{address}, #{currency}, #{taxRate}, #{status}, #{remark}, #{createBy}, now())
mapper.update: update base_supplier set supplier_code = #{supplierCode}, supplier_name = #{supplierName}, contact_person = #{contactPerson}, contact_phone = #{contactPhone}, address = #{address}, currency = #{currency}, tax_rate = #{taxRate}, status = #{status}, remark = #{remark}, update_by = #{updateBy}, update_time = now() where id = #{id}
mapper.delete: delete from base_supplier where id in #{id}
